description: peyeeye PII redaction & rehydration. Pre-call redacts PII into placeholder tokens, post-call swaps them back into the model's response.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your peyeeye API key. Find it in the peyeeye dashboard at https://peyeeye.ai.

apiBase.label: API Base URL
apiBase.description: Optional override of the peyeeye API base URL. Defaults to https://api.peyeeye.ai.

description.text: Redact PII from the request before it reaches the LLM. Caches a session id (or sealed key) so the response can be rehydrated.
BCP-47 locale tag, or "auto" to let peyeeye detect.
Optional list of entity ids to restrict detection to (e.g. EMAIL, PHONE, CARD). Omit to detect all 60+ built-in entities.
stateful = peyeeye stores the token→value mapping under a ses_… id. stateless = peyeeye returns a sealed AEAD blob (skey_…); nothing retained server-side.
Rehydrate the LLM's response by swapping placeholder tokens back to the original PII. No-op if no redaction happened on this request.
Must match the redact step. If stateful, the session is DELETEd from peyeeye after rehydration (best-effort).
